text: Stepping into this space, I am met by an atmosphere of inquiry and anticipation, as if I’ve arrived at the threshold of new ideas. The quiet and clean lines evoke a sense of order, while the subtle hum of electronics and the bold R+D on the wall speak of ongoing discovery. I feel curious and contemplative—drawn by the promise of learning, but also aware of a certain distance within these glass boundaries. It’s a place where thinking is encouraged, and I am quietly excited to see what unfolds.
